description: You are a localization coordinator. A corporate compliance training video needs to be localized for the Paris office. Create a single, 'flat' video file for the legacy intranet portal using the original video at /home/ga/Videos/compliance_training_master.mp4. Replace the original English audio with the French dub located at /home/ga/Music/french_dub_track.mp3. Permanently burn the translated subtitles from /home/ga/Documents/french_captions.srt into the video frames (hardsubbing), ensuring there are no soft-subtitle streams in the final file. Overlay the corporate watermark logo from /home/ga/Pictures/corp_watermark.png onto the video. Save the final transcoded video to /home/ga/Videos/localized_delivery/compliance_french_final.mp4
